name: Miniature Pecan Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, butter, and salt in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
2. Remove from heat. Break eggs into a medium bowl. Remove 1 tablespoon egg white and set aside. Beat the remaining eggs with a fork until well combined.
3. Gradually add the hot mixture to the beaten eggs, stirring constantly. Stir in pecans and vanilla.
4. Beat the reserved egg white until foamy. Lightly brush on each side of the tart shell.
5. Spoon filling into the tart shells, filling 3/4 full.
6. Bake at 450 degrees for 5 minutes. Reduce heat to 325 degrees and bake 12 minutes or until filling is set.
SOURCE: Southern Living Magazine, sometime in 1979. Typos by Nancy Coleman.
